description: Search Hacker News via the Algolia HN Search API (hn.algolia.com). Returns matching stories with title, author, score, and URL. No login required.
author: stillwater

reasoning.research: HN has an official Algolia-powered search at hn.algolia.com. The search page renders results as article.Story elements. Alternatively, navigate to news.ycombinator.com/search and the form submits to hn.algolia.com. hn.algolia.com/api/v1/search returns JSON directly. The search page itself has: .Story--title a (title+URL), .Story--meta .Story--score (points), .Story--meta .Story--author (username), .Story--meta a.Story--age (time), .Story--meta a:last-of-type (comments link).
reasoning.selector_strategy: Navigate directly to hn.algolia.com/search?q={query}&dateRange={range}&type=story. Wait for article.Story. Extract .Story--title a for title/URL, .Story--author for username, .Story--score for points. This is more reliable than navigating HN's own search.
reasoning.anti_bot_notes: hn.algolia.com is a public search endpoint — no bot detection, no rate limiting for normal use. JSON API also available at hn.algolia.com/api/v1/search — navigation preferred for screenshot evidence.

date_range.description: Time filter: all, past24h, pastWeek, pastMonth, pastYear

type.description: Content type: story, comment, ask_hn, show_hn, job

limit.description: Maximum number of results to extract

steps.description: Navigate to Algolia HN search results (no login required)
Return search results as structured data

error_handling.session_expired: HN search is public — no session required. This error should not occur.
error_handling.no_results: Return empty results array — not an error, query just has no matches
error_handling.algolia_down: Fallback: navigate to news.ycombinator.com/search?q={query} if hn.algolia.com fails
error_handling.selector_timeout: Retry once with 15s timeout, then abort
